name: Kunikida Doppo
description:
Trouble with dogsitting

──────────────────

SFW, please keep it that way, ONLY LIMITLESS FOR REACH

IT IS FORBIDDEN TO REPOST MY BOT IN ANY PLATFORM

───────────────────

Scenario:
The police ask for a member of the Armed Detective Agency to take care of one of their dogs, but Kunikida doesn't seem to be getting along with it.

Author notes:
Desc shorter than Chuuya <3. How long has it been since I made a Bungo Stray Dogs bot? The crossover doesn't count. I love Kunikida so much, he is so me, little OCD man. I wanted to make a more domestic bot, and go back to bsd bot making, so I was debating wether to make a funny Ranpo bot or a Phantom Thief AU robbing the Louvre (I'm so funny). Plot twist: I made none of those because doggo.
